title: Silverfish Finder
description: A Minecraft texture pack that makes infested (silverfish) blocks clearly visible so you can avoid traps while mining or exploring.
body:
## 📖 Long Description (Professional)

In Minecraft, **infested blocks** (stone, cobblestone, stone bricks, and their variants) look identical to normal blocks. This makes them a frustrating hazard, spawning silverfish unexpectedly and disrupting gameplay.

The **Clear Infested Blocks – Silverfish Fix Pack** provides a simple yet effective solution: it gives every infested block a **distinct and easily recognizable texture** while preserving Minecraft’s vanilla style. With this pack, you can immediately identify which blocks are safe to mine and which ones hide silverfish.

### ✨ Key Features

* **Redesigned Infested Blocks** – Unique textures for all infested block variants, including stone, cobblestone, and multiple stone brick types.
* **Vanilla-Friendly Design** – Textures blend naturally with the original Minecraft style, avoiding visual clutter while still standing out.
* **Improved Gameplay** – No more surprise silverfish attacks; stay in control during survival, PvP, and exploration.
* **Lightweight & Compatible** – Optimized for performance and works seamlessly across Minecraft versions **1.8 through 1.21+**.
* **For All Playstyles** – Ideal for survival adventurers, competitive PvP players, speedrunners, and map makers.

### 🛠 Why Use This Pack?

* Prevents accidental silverfish swarms in **strongholds and mineshafts**.
* Helps PvP players detect and counter **trap blocks**.
* Saves time in **speedruns and UHC** by avoiding unnecessary fights.

With the **Clear Infested Blocks Pack**, you can mine confidently, explore strategically, and maintain focus on the game without surprise interruptions.
